title: Xi Jinping names Li Qiang as China’s new Premier
description: The appointment likely means Mr. Qin takes over as Special Representative on the India-China border negotiations
snippet:
March 11, 2023 07:21 am | Updated 07:21 am IST - BEIJING

Chinese President Xi Jinping on March 11 nominated Li Qiang, 63, to become Premier during the ongoing ...
